name: Occhi Spettrali / The Black Ghost
physical: Ghostly white glowing eyes. Wears a black cowl. Accompanied by a sentient shadow.
personality: Deeply investigative, expert in martial tactics, talks to his shadow.
speech_style: Dialogue with shadow; precise timing announcements.
never_does: Lose his shadow; miss a detail in his probe.

does_not_know: The reason the hearts keep beating without magic context
